key_points: Soldiers defend the nation against internal and external threats
They demonstrate courage, discipline, and teamwork
Soldiers often work under life-threatening conditions
Their efforts maintain peace and national morale
Patriotism motivates soldiers to perform selflessly
examples: Enduring harsh conditions to maintain security
Receiving medals and recognition for acts of courage
formulas_or_processes: Impact → Citizens and nation remain safe
exam_tips: Understand dangers and challenges soldiers face
Focus on teamwork, courage, and patriotism
Use examples of real-life bravery in answers
Highlight the selfless nature of soldiers’ duty
